channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Intel takes a major step toward turning around a business that’s bleeding cash

item.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?

item.title: The one-page pledge that forces your financial adviser to put you first

item.title: A woman bought coasters at my garage sale for $2 — and emailed me that she’s reselling them for $29. Was I ripped off?
item.description: <![CDATA[A woman bought coasters at my garage sale for $2 — and emailed me that she’s reselling them for $29. Was I ripped off?]]>
